cit.basis: Standard 30% CIT under the Inland Revenue Act No. 24 of 2017, as amended 2022-2025.
cit.note: Administered by the Inland Revenue Department (IRD). Export of services taxed at 15% per the 2025 budget (previously exempt/zero); betting and gaming, liquor and tobacco taxed at the 45% sector rate.

vat.note: VAT increased from 15% to 18% effective 1 January 2024. The announced abolition of the Simplified VAT (SVAT) scheme has been postponed.

sscl.note: Social Security Contribution Levy (SSCL) of 2.5% on turnover of liable persons.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Sector qualification (export of services, betting/gaming, liquor, tobacco), reliefs, WHT, filing, and transitional rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
